name: Data Pipeline & Analytics
description: Bootstrap a data project wave with ETL pipeline, data warehouse, and analytics components

items.prompt: Build the {project_name} ETL pipeline. Implement data extraction from CSV/APIs, transformation logic for cleaning and aggregation, and loading into a data warehouse. Use Apache Airflow or Python scheduler for orchestration. Include error handling, logging, and retry logic. Create sample DAGs that run daily. Tests must validate transform outputs.

Set up the {project_name} data warehouse using dbt or SQL-based approach. Design fact and dimension tables for analytics. Create data models, transformations, and data quality tests. Build marts for reporting (daily sales, user cohorts, product performance). Use {base_dir}/warehouse as root. Ensure idempotent, incremental loading strategies.

Build the {project_name} analytics dashboard using Streamlit or Plotly Dash. Create interactive visualizations for: daily revenue trends, user acquisition cohorts, product performance leaderboard. Connect to the data warehouse for live queries. Add filters and date pickers. Deploy instructions for local and cloud. Responsive and accessible design.
items.testCmd: python -m pytest tests/dashboard/ -v && streamlit run src/dashboard/app.py --logger.level=debug 2>&1 | head -50

items.prompt: Implement data quality framework for {project_name}. Create validation rules for data freshness, null percentages, value ranges. Build automated checks that run after ETL. Generate quality reports (pass/fail/anomalies). Integrate with monitoring (alerting on failures). Include documentation on data lineage and SLAs.
